top_categories.workout_context: 98ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
Race-pace efforts that mimic Gran Fondo Hincapie's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before October.
At Gran Fondo Hincapie, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
Gran Fondo Hincapie's paved Blue Ridge foothill roads with sustained forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 83 miles.
At mile 60 of 83, glycogen is gone. This workout teaches your body to produce watts on fumes.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Gran Fondo Hincapie. Train it until it feels boring.
8,100ft of climbing on grades that change every minute. You need to switch from seated to standing without losing rhythm.
8,100ft of climbing means repeated surges above threshold. VO2max work is how you survive the fifth climb, not just the first.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At Gran Fondo Hincapie, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.
Endurance with intensity spikes baked in. Exactly what 8,100ft of climbing on paved Blue Ridge foothill roads with sustained does to your power file on race day.
Low-cadence force work for 8,100ft of climbing. The slow, grinding ascents where you can't spin—you push.
Short, max efforts are unavoidable. Punchy climbs, gap closures, attacks on paved Blue Ridge foothill roads with sustained. If you haven't trained them, you'll crack.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 60–80g carbs/hour for Gran Fondo Hincapie’s 83 miles. Start fueling within the first 30 minutes — early fueling prevents late-race collapse. Bonking at mile 60 is a nutrition failure, not a fitness failure.
race_overlay.terrain: Mixed terrain at Gran Fondo Hincapie requires surface adaptability. Include weekly rides on paved blue ridge foothill roads with sustained mountain climbs to build confidence.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on TT Threshold, Race Simulation, and Over Under to prepare you for 83 miles of paved blue ridge foothill roads with sustained mountain climbs in Travelers Rest, South Carolina.
